title: An Act to Establish Requirements for Warming Shelters
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 22, 2025
last_house_action: 3/25/2025 - Committee on State and Local Government suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on STATE AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/22/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
